---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
# Libraries
```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(targets)
library(tidyverse)
library(visNetwork)
```


# Check pipeline status
```{r}
tar_glimpse()
```


```{r}
tar_visnetwork()

```

# Format relevant aspects of network
```{r}
net <- tar_visnetwork()

# Assign targets to groups
net$x$nodes <- net$x$nodes %>%
  mutate(group = if_else(grepl("final", id), "FinalNode", "IntermediaryNode"))

# Define group colors and display
net %>%
  visGroups(group = "FinalNode", color = "red") %>%
  visLegend()


```



```{r}
tar_visnetwork(targets_only = TRUE)
```

```{r}
tar_manifest()
tar_manifest(fields = name)$name
```


# Construct pipeline
```{r}
# targets::tar_make(callr_function = NULL) # for debugging
targets::tar_make()
```

# Destroy pipeline (off by default)
```{r, warning=FALSE, eval = FALSE }
tar_destroy()
# targets::tar_destroy(ask = FALSE)

```
